available_skills.skill: Leaf fixture skill A — no dependencies, sits at the bottom of the topological order for prompt-emitter parity tests; trivial body.
Fixture skill B — depends on prompt-fix-a, sits second in topological order; trivial body for parity tests.
Fixture skill C — depends on prompt-fix-b, sits third in topological order; trivial body for parity tests.
Fixture skill D — depends on prompt-fix-c, sits fourth in topological order; trivial body for parity tests.
Fixture skill E — depends on prompt-fix-d, sits fifth (root) in topological order; trivial body for parity tests.
